title: Cirrus: Change us-central1-a -> us-east4-a
body:
Currently that zone is experiencing capacity overages, causing VM
creation to stall and timeout.  Switch to a less-used zone for VMs.
Previously it was believed that cirrus only supported us-central1-a.
As of this commit, that appears to not be the case.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Aww, fail :cry: Looked in cirrus-ci job for this PR and it shows error:

`FAILED_PRECONDITION: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Not supported at the moment zone us-east4-a!`

I'll contact their support about this, there's nothing google will do for us since this is a cirrus-limitation (and other zones are working fine).
Contacted cirrus-support.  We can re-open this if/when support for other zones is implemented.
